summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and deep hands-on strength in Python, SQL/PLSQL, ETL/ELT, data warehousing, data quality, and production analytics pipelines. Experienced building AWS-oriented data platforms using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2/ECS, and Lambda concepts to move raw operational data into curated datasets for analysts, executives, and business stakeholders. Strong background in regulated enterprise environments, metadata-aware pipeline design, data governance, production support, automation, and cross-functional delivery with research, analytics, BI, and infrastructure teams.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and maintained Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual data preparation with repeatable production data flows for analytics and executive reporting.

Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Athena/Redshift-style analytics patterns, and optimized relational schemas to support forecasting, reporting, and operational decision-making.

Designed SQL and PL/SQL data models, retention structures, and reporting layers for historical infrastructure analytics, improving reuse of curated datasets across capacity, monitoring, and stakeholder reporting use cases.

Implemented data quality, reconciliation, and validation practices for telemetry pipelines, helping ensure integrity of warehouse outputs consumed by analysts, engineering teams, and senior stakeholders.
Operationalized forecasting and analytics workloads by moving heavy Python/ML processing toward cloud-scale data platforms, improving parallel processing, maintainability, and production readiness.

Partnered with infrastructure, application, analytics, and leadership teams to refine requirements, explain data outputs, troubleshoot production issues, and turn operational data into actionable business insights.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, using performance and user-experience data to guide engineering optimization work.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic monitoring data to surface actionable recommendations adopted by engineering teams for customer-facing systems.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load testing, APM telemetry, transaction tracing, and analytics outputs for release and production readiness decisions.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services environment, supporting 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000-6,000 instrumented agents across production-critical systems.
Built Perl/Korn Shell data-extraction and operational reporting scripts that replaced manual weekly exports and improved consistency of performance analytics delivered to stakeholders.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, technical documentation, and training materials adopted by client teams to support production governance and operational excellence.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, validating transaction data correctness and preserving sub-second query performance.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and migration checks using C++/OCCI/OCI and SQL, supporting phased cutover of business-critical transaction data.
Optimized core database access and processing logic, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining reliability for high-volume transactional workloads.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, PySpark, Perl, Korn Shell, C++, Java, XML, JSON

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift-style analytics, PySpark, and Bedrock to land, transform, query, and expose curated enterprise data. Emphasized reusable ETL, columnar storage, small-file mitigation, cost-aware query design, and analytics consumption.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and analytics platform that transformed operational telemetry into curated datasets and dashboards for capacity planning, risk forecasting, and executive decision support.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an automated Python pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, LLM scoring, JSON artifacts, quality gates, and tracking. Demonstrates practical DataOps-style automation, validation, and artifact governance.
